name: GBT27930IL_InitAsBMS
title: GBT27930IL_InitAsBMS
description: Inits simulated node as a BMS. This function may be called at the earliest in on start, then it is verified whether all necessary messages are entered into the Tx list. Info about all missing messages will be displayed in the Write Window.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.
